zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：窄幅震荡偏多格局
zh.content:
当前ETH围绕1615附近窄幅整理，价格略高于SMA20，短线动能偏中性略多，整体进入震荡蓄势阶段市场方向仍待确认，波动收敛明显

指标方面MACD仍维持正值8.83但信号线缺失，RSI未提供，动量结构不完整但多头动能尚未衰竭短线仍以震荡为主运行态

支撑位关注1614与1610区间，SMA20构成短线防守线；上方阻力在1618至1622，突破需放量确认否则仍为震荡结构中性

交易策略建议以区间操作为主，低位轻仓试多，高位分批止盈，避免追涨杀跌，等待趋势确认后再加仓控制仓位与风险纪律执行重要

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum against the US dollar is currently moving within a tight consolidation range after a minor 0.21% daily decline. Price action remains compressed between the recent intraday high and low, suggesting indecision among participants. Despite the flat performance, the market structure shows a mild bullish undertone as price holds slightly above the 20-period simple moving average, indicating short-term equilibrium rather than a clear directional breakout.

The MACD reading at 8.84 suggests positive momentum continuation, although the absence of a signal line limits confirmation strength. With RSI unavailable, momentum assessment relies heavily on price structure and moving average behavior. Trading near the 20-period SMA indicates equilibrium, where buyers and sellers are balanced, but slight bullish pressure persists as price stability is maintained above the short-term trend baseline.

Immediate support is located near 1614, aligning closely with the recent session low and the 20-period moving average, making it a critical short-term defense zone. A break below this level could expose downside toward 1600, a psychological threshold. On the upside, resistance appears at 1618–1620, followed by a stronger barrier near 1625, where recent selling pressure has previously capped upward momentum.

Traders may consider a range-bound strategy while price remains between defined support and resistance levels, favoring short-term mean reversion plays. Buying near support around 1614 with tight risk control may be reasonable, while taking partial profits near resistance zones. A confirmed breakout above 1620 could signal continuation strength, whereas a breakdown below 1614 would shift bias bearish and warrant defensive positioning or reduced exposure.
